title: AI-DLC Rule-Pack Frontmatter
description: Full PACK-01 authoring contract + PACK-03 advisory/binding classification. Validates D-01..D-04 (multi-axis triggers), D-13 (severity), D-14 (independent axes), D-15 (binding needs a named contract). Scope-vs-directory (D-09) and duplicate-id (D-12) are programmatic checks owned by plan 01-03, not the schema.

id.description: Author-assigned slug (D-12), globally unique across the store. Same id across scopes is the intentional override signal.

scope.description: Scope tier. MUST also match the declaring directory (D-09) via a post-parse check added in 01-03.

triggers.description: D-03: an empty object {} is VALID and means always-in-phase. NO minProperties — every axis is optional. Axes OR-combine (D-02); exclude wins over any positive match.

exclude.description: D-02 negative selectors. Exclusion wins over any positive axis match.

phases.description: Applicable workflow phase(s). Claude's Discretion starter set aligned with AI-DLC Inception/Construction/Operations + a shared `common` bucket — single-sourced here, revisited in Phase 2 (RESEARCH A1).

summary.description: One-line injected summary. NO maxLength — the token-budget cap is a deferred Phase 2 idea (SEL-05), not a Phase 1 constraint.

classification.description: Enforcement classification (D-14), independent of severity. A `binding` rule must name an enforcement contract (D-15, enforced by allOf below).

detailPath.description: Optional (D-06) pointer to a separate detail file, resolved relative to the declaring rule file (D-08). Resolution/traversal guard is 01-03.

enforcement.description: Free-form named contract id (e.g. `semgrep:no-eval`, `ci:exit-code`, `human-approval`). Declared here so additionalProperties:false + the binding if/then coexist without unevaluatedProperties (Pitfall 3). v1 does NOT resolve it against any registry (D-15).

taskTypeArray.description: D-04: taskType matches by enum equality. Claude's Discretion starter set — single-sourced so the positive and exclude axes share it and a Phase 2 change is a one-line edit (RESEARCH A2).

allOf.$comment: D-14/D-15: a binding rule must name an enforcement contract. Because enforcement is declared in top-level properties, additionalProperties:false is still satisfied with no unevaluatedProperties (Pitfall 3).
